collectorName.description: The name of the collector (IntegrationRunner) in the same namespace

pollingInterval.description: How often the integration should run

pollingIntervalCron.description: Cron schedule for polling (alternative to pollingInterval)

resourceGroupId.description: Resource Group ID to associate with the integration instance

config.description: Non-sensitive configuration passed to spec.config on the IntegrationInstance. All values must be strings.
